scripts.dev: concurrently -n web,api -c magenta,cyan "npm run dev -w @fish-scan/web" "npm run dev -w @fish-scan/api"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @fish-scan/shared && npm run build -w @fish-scan/fishing-rules && npm run build -w @fish-scan/api && npm run build -w @fish-scan/web
scripts.test: npm run test -w @fish-scan/fishing-rules && npm run test -w @fish-scan/api
